data.settleTest: Vendor rack-PDU revenue per colo megawatt for the Netherlands vs CE-7 average (from PDU vendor country splits like Vertiv/Legrand/Schneider or a colo fit-out BOM dataset) — a purchasable/obtainable dataset that would confirm today whether NL's PDU-euro intensity per MW differs from average.

proposedCorrection.rationale: NL's 0.28 rests on raw colo-MW share, but a disproportionate share of hyperscaler self-build/busway halls in NL buys fewer discrete PDUs per MW, so the PDU-euro weight should be scaled down toward the low end of its current band.

researchQueries.query: PDU vendor (Vertiv, Legrand/Raritan, Schneider APC) Netherlands rack-PDU revenue or units per installed colo megawatt vs European average, 2024-2025
Netherlands colocation fit-out bill-of-materials showing discrete rack-PDU spend per MW comparable to Germany/France (CE-7) despite hyperscaler self-build share
